en: Lived not to find And he was this big ass sailor moon
ko: 그가 이 거대한 짐승이었다는 걸 알게 됐어

en: He came from the outskirts Came from the ancient town
Worked like a switchblade So no one could take him down
No, he had no money No, no good at home
Walked the streets a soldier And he fought the world alone
And now he's eighteen Eighteen in life you got it
Eighteen in life you know And you'll cry this time
And it's eighteen in life to go
Eighteen in life you got it Eighteen in life you know
And it's eighteen in life to go
The key lie in his heartbeat His veins full of gasoline
ko: 열쇠는 그의 심장 박동에 있어, 그의 운명은
